title: T-045 — Production settings, OEE target windows + taxonomy Server Actions (08-PROD-f, SCR-08-10 / MODAL-08-15)
prompt:
# T-045 — Production settings, OEE target windows + taxonomy Server Actions

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-10, MODAL-08-15, §6 D5/D6/D7, §5.2 (business constraints)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement the Server Actions backing SCR-08-10 Production Settings + MODAL-08-15 OEE Target Edit: consumption tolerance, yield gate threshold, catch-weight tolerance, FEFO deviation policy, waste alert threshold, OEE aggregation interval, OEE target effective-date windows (resolving BL-PROD-04), and D365 push toggle proxy (read-through to 02-SETTINGS §11). Downtime/waste taxonomies are deep-linked into 02-SETTINGS admin; no taxonomy mutation lives in this task.

## Implementation contract
1. `packages/api-services/production/settings.ts` — zod schemas + actions: `updateProductionSettings`, `upsertOeeTarget`, `getProductionSettings`, `getOeeTargets`.
2. OEE target windows: `prod_oee_targets (effective_date, line_id, target_a, target_p, target_q, changed_by, change_reason)`; `upsertOeeTarget` rejects overlapping or backdated windows (`effective_date >= tomorrow`); on save, the prior window for the same line is closed.
3. `apps/web/app/production/settings/actions.ts` thin Server Action wrapper enforcing Prod Manager role (V-PROD-OEE-001 / V-PROD-SETTINGS-001) from 02-SETTINGS §14 and writing `audit_log` (actor, key, old/new value, timestamp).
4. D365 push toggles (`integration.d365.push.enabled`, `dry_run`, `batch_size`) are read/written only through the 02-SETTINGS §11 settings adapter; Production never owns D365 secrets.
5. `packages/db/schema/production-settings.ts` — extend with `prod_oee_targets` table (V-PROD-OEE windowing) and `prod_settings_line_overrides` for ATP RLU threshold per-line.

## Files
- packages/api-services/production/settings.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/production/settings/actions.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production-settings.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_prod_oee_targets.sql [create]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/settings.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an existing OEE target window for LINE-01 with `effective_date='2026-06-01'`, when `upsertOeeTarget` is called with another window `effective_date='2026-06-05'` for LINE-01, then the existing window is closed (`closed_at='2026-06-04'`) and the new one is inserted; calling again with the same dates is a no-op.
2. Given `upsertOeeTarget` is called with `effective_date < tomorrow`, when the action runs, then it returns 422 `cannot_backdate_target` and inserts nothing.
3. Given `updateProductionSettings` is invoked by a non-Plant-Manager user, when the action runs, then it returns 403 `forbidden` and writes no `audit_log` rows.

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/api-services/production/__tests__/settings.test.ts asserting overlapping window rejection, backdate rejection, RBAC guard and audit_log emission before code exists.
- Run `pnpm vitest run packages/api-services/production/__tests__/settings.test.ts`
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not let Production own D365 secrets — flag toggles proxy 02-SETTINGS §11.
- Do not allow backdated OEE target windows (BL-PROD-04 resolution).
- Do not skip Prod Manager RBAC guard (V-PROD-OEE-001).
- Do not mutate downtime_categories / waste_categories from this task (02-SETTINGS §8 owns the taxonomy).

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions backing SCR-08-10 Production Settings + MODAL-08-15 OEE Target Edit; effective-date windowing for OEE targets and Prod Manager RBAC guard.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single settings service exposes typed Server Actions. prod_oee_targets table introduces effective-date windowing (BL-PROD-04 fix). OEE target inserts reject overlapping or backdated windows (server-side enforced). D365 push toggles proxy 02-SETTINGS §11; secrets stay there. Downtime/waste taxonomy mutation lives in 02-SETTINGS §8; Production settings UI only deep-links and displays seed values. All saves audit-logged with actor/old/new/timestamp.

Do not mutate downtime_categories / waste_categories (02-SETTINGS §8 admin)
Do not implement OEE target preview / preview math (UI only)

Given upsertOeeTarget is called with effective_date < tomorrow, when action runs, then it returns 422 cannot_backdate_target and inserts nothing.
Given updateProductionSettings is invoked by a non-Plant-Manager user, when action runs, then it returns 403 forbidden and writes no audit_log rows.
